name: Fruit Cake (Satterly)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pot, combine the first four ingredients (raisins, water, sugar, and shortening). Bring to a boil and simmer for 1 minute. Set aside to cool.
2. Sift together the dry ingredients: white flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, allspice, and cloves.
3. Make a well in the center of the dry mixture and fold in the boiled ingredients from step 1. Mix well until combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased cake pan and bake at 300°F for 60 minutes.
5. Test the cake to ensure it is done throughout by inserting a toothpick. If not fully cooked, return to the oven for a few more minutes.
6. Remove from the oven and cool on a wire rack.
